headline: Veteran QB benched amid playoff push
summary: A longtime starter was benched after a rough stretch, dividing fans and teammates.

headline: Rival star calls benching disrespectful before Sunday matchup
summary: A star on this week's opponent criticized the move and added fuel to the matchup.

headline: Undrafted replacement was working warehouse shifts 2 years ago
summary: The new starter has become a feel-good story after an unlikely climb.
